The '''''Manticore''''' was a [[Strike-class medium cruiser|''Strike''-class medium cruiser]] belonging to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]]. It was scheduled to be repaired at [[Depot XLS]], but was attacked by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wing starfighters]] intending to destroy all the capital ships while they were at their weakest condition.

==Behind the scenes==
Whether or not ''Manticore'' gets destroyed depends on the player's actions in ''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter: Balance of Power Campaigns]]''.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter: Balance of Power Campaigns]]'' {{1st}}
